apiKeyDescription: Use the generated value as a Bearer token. Generating a new key replaces the old one.
authorizationSessionMissing: Missing authorization session. Start again from settings.
authorizationStateMismatch: Authorization state mismatch. Start again from settings.
authorizationSucceededDescription: The refresh token has been saved. Drive requests can now refresh Microsoft Graph tokens automatically.
description: Manage the admin login, OneDrive authorization, and long-lived API key.
oneDriveAuthorizationDescription: Start authorization with the fixed Microsoft Graph app configuration and full read/write file access. On success, the refresh token is saved automatically.
passwordMinError: Password must be at least 9 characters.
passwordMismatchError: The two passwords do not match.
usernameMinError: Username must be at least 4 characters.
